## Target skill

- Skill name:
- Bundle:

## What needs improvement

Choose any that apply:
- trigger condition is unclear
- boundary with neighboring skills is unclear
- steps are too vague
- support files are missing or under-documented
- verification is too weak
- wording is still too host-specific

## Suggested improvement

Describe the change you recommend.

## Why it matters

Explain how the current version could mislead a future user or agent.
